pip_2026-07-12.mp4.title: What happens when Pip presses a viral squishy toy? ✨
pip_2026-07-12.mp4.description:
Experiment Log #7126: I finally got my paws on one of these super squishy, jiggly cube toys! The Mystical Press is ready for its most satisfying challenge yet. What do you think will happen? 🤔 Pip-pip!
